reviews.comment: One on one experience, lesson was worthwhile. Got all the essentials in a short amount of time. Although I had to reschedule due to the instructor being at a different location then I had signed up for, they made it up to me by rescheduling with no extra fees. Process was speedy and I was happy to have been able to get in. Class was only me and the instructor. Great experience would use again.

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for your review, Poppy! We appreciate your feedback and are glad to hear that you had a worthwhile experience with us. We apologize for the inconvenience caused by the rescheduling, but we're happy that we were able to accommodate you and make it up to you. We hope to have the opportunity to serve you again in the future. Take care!

We are deeply honored by your 5-star review! 🌟 The fact that your positive experience with us prompted your very first Google review means the world to us. Your decision to take a moment out of your day to share your appreciation speaks volumes about the exceptional service and experience we strive to provide.

Kelly, you're a rockstar!  We appreciate the fantastic 5-star rating! 🌟

For friends and colleagues looking to embrace the BLS adventure, share the magic with them by directing them to www.bit.ly/CCC-HCBLS. 🪄

And for a glimpse of the full spectrum of courses we offer, from BLS to ACLS and PALS, they can dive into the details at www.910cpr.com. 🏊

Your recommendation means the world to us. 🦸‍♂️👍

Be Safe!
